Corenna Swann
Corenna Swann, by dyannawynnedayne ©
Allegiances
  • House Swann
  • House Frey
Successor Jeyne Lydden
Culture Marcher
Born ~233–237 AC[1]
Died ~245–249 AC[1]
Spouse Ser Stevron Frey
Issue Ryman Frey
Books
  • A Clash of Kings (mentioned)
  • A Storm of Swords (mentioned)
  • A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Corenna Swann was a noblewoman of House Swann during the reign of King Aegon V Targaryen. She was the first wife of Ser Stevron Frey, and had one son by him, Ser Ryman Frey.[2]

History[ ]

Corenna died of a wasting illness.[2]

Family[ ]

Corenna's relation to Gulian Swann, the Lord of Stonehelm, is unknown.
